name: The Crypt of the Fallen
description: Beneath the ruined Chapel of Saint Aldric lies a forgotten crypt, sealed for generations. The knights who once guarded the chapel fell to a creeping darkness that seeped up from the depths. Now the dead stir in their tombs, and something hungry waits at the heart of the crypt.

rooms.name: Shattered Vestibule
rooms.narrative: You descend crumbling stone steps into a vestibule choked with dust and cobwebs. Faded frescoes on the walls depict [b]Saint Aldric[/b] raising a lantern against a tide of shadow. A [color=yellow]rusted dagger[/color] lies half-buried in rubble near the bottom step — dropped by some adventurer who came before you and never returned.

rooms.name: Rat-Gnawed Cloister
rooms.narrative: This long chamber once served as a cloister where the chapel's monks took their meals. Overturned tables and shattered crockery litter the floor. Gnawed bones are piled in the far corner, and you hear [color=red]scratching and squeaking[/color] from the shadows — a giant rat has made its nest here among the refuse.

rooms.name: Defiled Prayer Alcove
rooms.narrative: A small prayer alcove branches off from the main passage. Shattered prayer candles and torn hymnals cover the floor. The air smells faintly of decay. A stone pressure plate, [color=gray]almost invisible beneath the debris[/color], is set into the floor before the alcove's small altar.

rooms.name: Monk's Quarters
rooms.narrative: The monks' sleeping quarters are in disarray — straw pallets rotting, personal effects scattered. But beneath an overturned cot, a [color=yellow]gleam of metal[/color] catches your eye. Someone hid supplies here before the crypt fell, provisions that time has not entirely claimed.

rooms.name: The Sealed Reliquary
rooms.narrative:
[color=red][b]GUARDIAN ENCOUNTER[/b][/color]

A heavy iron door hangs ajar, revealing a reliquary lined with stone niches. Most are empty, their contents long plundered. But at the far end, a [color=cyan]skeleton in rusted chainmail[/color] stands motionless before the last sealed niche, its hollow eyes flickering with pale light. It raises a notched sword as you enter.

[color=yellow]A knight of Saint Aldric, still guarding his post in death.[/color]

choices.text: Kneel and invoke Saint Aldric's name.

on_clear.narrative: [color=green]The skeletal guardian crumbles. In the niche behind it, you find stairs descending deeper into the crypt. Whatever darkness consumed this place lies below.[/color]

rooms.name: Ossuary Landing
rooms.narrative: The stairs open into a hall of bones. Skulls are stacked neatly in alcoves along the walls, hundreds of them, their hollow eye sockets fixed on you. [color=gray]Scratched into the stone archway above[/color], barely legible: [i]"Here rest those who fell to shadow. Do not wake them."[/i]

rooms.name: Hall of Sarcophagi
rooms.narrative: Six stone sarcophagi line this chamber in two rows, their lids carved with the likenesses of armored knights. Two lids have been pushed aside. [color=red]Faint scratching echoes[/color] from within the opened tombs — the rats have found their way down here too, nesting among the bones of the dead.

rooms.name: Collapsed Passage
rooms.narrative: The ceiling here is fractured, [color=gray]spiderweb cracks radiating from a central point[/color] where something struck from above — or below. Loose stones and rubble litter the floor. The passage narrows dangerously, and dust sifts down with every footstep.

rooms.name: Knight Commander's Tomb
rooms.narrative: Unlike the others, this burial chamber was built for a single occupant. A grand sarcophagus dominates the center, its lid carved with a knight holding a shield bearing the sigil of Saint Aldric. The tomb has been partially opened, but [color=yellow]the knight's armor and helm remain[/color], too heavy for whatever looter came before.

rooms.name: The Shadow Shrine
rooms.narrative:
[color=red][b]SHADOW ENCOUNTER[/b][/color]

A dark altar dominates this chamber, carved from a single block of obsidian. Unholy runes pulse with [color=purple]faint violet light[/color] along its surface. As you approach, the torchlight dims and the temperature plummets. A [color=purple]formless darkness[/color] peels itself from the wall behind the altar — a shadow, the echo of a soul consumed by whatever corrupted this place.

[color=yellow]The source of the crypt's corruption seems to lie even deeper below.[/color]

choices.text: Attack the shadow before it strikes!
Hurl your torch at it and run past.
Hold up a holy symbol and pray.

on_clear.narrative: [color=green]The shadow dissipates with a thin wail. Behind the altar, a hidden staircase spirals downward. Cold air rises from below, carrying a faint, rhythmic sound — like breathing.[/color]

rooms.name: The Cold Threshold
rooms.narrative: The air here is [color=cyan]bitterly cold[/color]. Frost clings to the stone walls in crystalline patterns, and your breath mists before you. The stairs behind you feel distant, as though the crypt itself has swallowed you. Ahead, a deep rhythmic [color=gray]thud... thud... thud...[/color] reverberates through the stone — like a heartbeat.

rooms.name: The Fallen Honor Guard
rooms.narrative: Two stone plinths flank the passage, each bearing the remains of an armored figure. These were the crypt's honor guard in life — elite knights sworn to protect what lies beyond. In death, one has risen as a [color=red]shambling corpse in dented plate[/color], its jaw hanging loose, its grip still locked around a notched blade.

rooms.name: Warded Antechamber
rooms.narrative: Glowing sigils are carved into the floor of this small chamber, forming a [color=cyan]protective ward[/color] that was once meant to keep the darkness sealed below. The wards have cracked and faded, but some still hold a faint charge. [color=gray]Stepping on the wrong sigil could release the stored energy.[/color]

rooms.name: Saint Aldric's Reliquary
rooms.narrative: Behind a collapsed wall, you find the true reliquary — the one the skeleton upstairs was meant to guard. A golden reliquary chest sits on a stone pedestal, surrounded by [color=yellow]offerings of coin and fine craft[/color]. A suit of gilded armor stands on a wooden frame, remarkably untouched by time or decay, still gleaming in the darkness.

rooms.name: The Crypt Heart — Ghoul's Sanctum
rooms.narrative:
[color=red][b]FINAL BOSS — THE GHOUL[/b][/color]

The heartbeat grows deafening as you enter a vast, vaulted chamber. At its center, a [color=red]gaunt, hunched figure[/color] crouches over a pile of gnawed bones — a ghoul, the source of the corruption that has seeped through the crypt. Its elongated claws scrape against stone as it turns to face you, lips pulled back from yellowed fangs.

Behind it, a [color=cyan]shimmering portal[/color] pulses in an archway carved with the prayers of Saint Aldric — the way out, if you can reach it.

[color=yellow]Defeat the Ghoul or find another way past to escape the Crypt of the Fallen![/color]

choices.text: Charge in and fight the ghoul!
Hurl food from your pack to distract it, then dash for the portal.
Invoke Saint Aldric's blessing to weaken the undead.

on_clear.narrative:
[color=green]The ghoul lets out a terrible shriek as it falls, its body crumbling to dust. The rhythmic heartbeat ceases. The frost melts from the walls. The portal behind flares with golden light — Saint Aldric's ward, restored at last.

You step through, leaving the Crypt of the Fallen behind. The darkness is broken. The dead may finally rest.[/color]
